lastReleaseMessage: docs: restore audit-apothecary-nightly to daily cadence

barRaise.topFinding: The prior review's whole action list shipped cleanly. v1.1.0 (9ba343e) landed the stranded v1.0.4 sweep (print autofit reaches the print-stage, Export PNG wired end to end, illustration provenance recorded, Apothocary brand typo gone), v1.1.1 (213b7ac) closed both residuals the same review found (fitPrintStage self-fits the hidden print tree offscreen so a collapsed preview section can't strand the printed herb name; release.ps1 hard-exit-1s when node is off PATH instead of shipping untested), and v1.1.2 (d3aab7b) locked the illustration-licensing decision. All three version pills agree at v1.1.2 and the three test suites run green (data-integrity clean, render 71/71, migration 31/31). Both tensions the prior three reviews carried are resolved: the ship-half of the audit loop fired (v1.0.4 shipped as v1.1.0), and the cadence-vs-coverage tension closed by Kane's explicit 2026-07-14 decision to restore daily audit + bar-raise on every active project, reversing the assistant-originated v1.0 weekly-only cut. One benign LOW remains: outputs/ is gitignored yet two grandfathered batch2 citation files stay tracked. No HIGH, no MEDIUM, no BLOCK.
